title: Gig
content:
{{Top|leg}}
A '''gig''' was a high maneuverable three-person vessel with limited armament. Gigs were used by [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Fleet Captain/Legends|fleet captains]] and [[Admiral/Legends|admirals]] for personal transport.

==Appearances==
*''[[Han Solo at Stars' End]]'' {{1st}}
*''[[Dark Forces: Soldier for the Empire]]''

==Sources==
*<!-- 1984-12-XX -->''[[A Guide to the Star Wars Universe]]''
